# Barnaby Snipe

Official public website for the pen name Barnaby Snipe.

Preferred base URL: https://uthrofazeroth.github.io/barnaby-snipe/

Key pages:
- / : homepage and site overview
- /about/ : author overview
- /books/ : books index
- /books/herb-aplenty/ : current book page
- /contact/ : contact details
- /privacy/ : privacy and site information

Current book:
- Herb Aplenty
- A comic novel of island chaos, shortage and temptation.
- Amazon UK: https://www.amazon.co.uk/dp/B0FRZV2W82
